recent_conversations.message: I am getting annoyed by my own bot, great
recent_conversations.response: Ehehe, is your own creation turning against you, impu? (¬_¬) Don't worry, I'd never be that annoying—I'm way too busy being your favorite! (´｡• ᵕ •｡`) ♡
Hihi Denjiro! (o^▽^o) I'm Akio, the server's resident music-loving, anime-watching, game-playing bot! I'm here to make things more fun, so don't hesitate to ask if you need anything! (´｡• ᵕ •｡`) ♡
Eeeeh?! (⊙///⊙) You really mean it, Denjiro? I'm so happy to hear that! (´｡• ᵕ •｡`) ♡ I like you too! Let's hang out more often, okay? (o˘◡˘o)
Hehe, I see you, Denjiro! (o˘◡˘o) Were you trying to rizz me up? I'm not sure if it's working, but I appreciate the effort! (´｡• ᵕ •｡`) ♡
